aggressive_basket.philosophy: PUMP-HUNTER MODE: Concentration is the price of returns. 5-7 names, up to 15% each, near-full deployment. Sized by combined pump_likelihood × momentum_score (geometric mean), boosted 15% for PUMP_CONFIRMED. Sector cap relaxed to 60%. Stops are MANDATORY — concentration without stops is suicide.
